## Scope

- Task / handoff ID:
- Change category: code | data contract | simulation source | documentation | release
- Formal-training impact: none | remains blocked | changes gate (explain)

## Validation

- [ ] `python -m ruff check pgdacsnet scripts tests`
- [ ] `python scripts/check_configs.py`
- [ ] Focused pytest command recorded below
- [ ] Required contract/release validation recorded below
- [ ] No machine-local paths, raw solver outputs, VTI files, or local runtime profile added

Commands and results:

```text
paste commands and concise results here
```

## Data and provenance

- [ ] No immutable measured release was edited in place
- [ ] Manifest, hash, and human decision are updated where applicable
- [ ] Line9-conditioned material remains blocked from strict Line9 claims

## Handoff

- [ ] Updated handoff record or explained why one is not needed
- [ ] Documented unresolved risks and the next safe entry point
